subject: Biology
title: Protected Areas and Reserves
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Protected Areas and Reserves.

hook.text: About 17% of Earth's land and 8% of its oceans are now in protected areas.

buildup.text: National parks, marine reserves, and wildlife corridors shield habitats from development.

discovery.text: Well-managed reserves boost biodiversity, restore fish stocks, and sequester carbon.

twist.text: Many protected areas exist only on paper. Without enforcement, poaching and logging continue.

climax.text: The '30 by 30' goal aims to protect 30% of land and sea by 2030 for planetary health.

punchline.text: A park without enforcement is just a line on a map.

quiz.question: What does the '30 by 30' conservation goal aim to do?
options: Protect 30% of land and sea by 2030
